meta.name: config-toml-workspace
meta.description: TOML config with full workspace section and all options

config.content:
[workspace]
versioning = "semver"
tag_template = "v{version}"
release_commit_mode = "commit"

[[package]]
name = "myapp"
path = "."
versioned_files = [{path = "version.toml", format = "toml"}]

commits.message: feat: add feature via toml config
